## Meeting Purpose

[Daily standup to discuss Atlas Sync workflow issues and updates.](https://fathom.video/share/7ofwofJurQpX1SdPZ4LZPzHpkxb5jqKZ?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Bullet point formatting issues persist; update pushed but needs further tweaking](https://fathom.video/share/7ofwofJurQpX1SdPZ4LZPzHpkxb5jqKZ?tab=summary&timestamp=65.0)
  - [Article archetype selection heavily favors "how-to" format; immediate workaround via explicit topic/direction input](https://fathom.video/share/7ofwofJurQpX1SdPZ4LZPzHpkxb5jqKZ?tab=summary&timestamp=131.0)
  - [Walls of text problem stems from recent prompt adjustments; fix in progress](https://fathom.video/share/7ofwofJurQpX1SdPZ4LZPzHpkxb5jqKZ?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)
  - [Internal linking improvements underway, addressing hallucinated external links](https://fathom.video/share/7ofwofJurQpX1SdPZ4LZPzHpkxb5jqKZ?tab=summary&timestamp=921.0)

## Topics

### Bullet Point Formatting Issues

  - [Recent update by Kirkland aimed to address the problem](https://fathom.video/share/7ofwofJurQpX1SdPZ4LZPzHpkxb5jqKZ?tab=summary&timestamp=65.0)
  - [Current state: "too well up-texty", needs further refinement](https://fathom.video/share/7ofwofJurQpX1SdPZ4LZPzHpkxb5jqKZ?tab=summary&timestamp=94.0)
  - [Temporary solution: leave bullet points as-is for now](https://fathom.video/share/7ofwofJurQpX1SdPZ4LZPzHpkxb5jqKZ?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)

### Article Archetype Selection

  - [Atlas consistently choosing "how-to" format due to SERP analysis and archetype weighting](https://fathom.video/share/7ofwofJurQpX1SdPZ4LZPzHpkxb5jqKZ?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)
  - [Immediate workaround: Use explicit titles (e.g., "comparison of X vs Y") and leverage direction field](https://fathom.video/share/7ofwofJurQpX1SdPZ4LZPzHpkxb5jqKZ?tab=summary&timestamp=357.0)
  - [Medium-term plan: Implement archetype picker for user selection](https://fathom.video/share/7ofwofJurQpX1SdPZ4LZPzHpkxb5jqKZ?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
  - [Long-term vision: Prompt-based schema creation and expanded format library](https://fathom.video/share/7ofwofJurQpX1SdPZ4LZPzHpkxb5jqKZ?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)

### Walls of Text Problem

  - [Recent prompt tweaks led to overcorrection from skeletal outlines to dense text](https://fathom.video/share/7ofwofJurQpX1SdPZ4LZPzHpkxb5jqKZ?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)
  - [Current state preferable to previous skeletal version but not ideal](https://fathom.video/share/7ofwofJurQpX1SdPZ4LZPzHpkxb5jqKZ?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
  - [Fix in progress to find balance between bullet points and paragraphs](https://fathom.video/share/7ofwofJurQpX1SdPZ4LZPzHpkxb5jqKZ?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)

### Ask.ai Chatbot Feature

  - [Mixed success reported for reformatting content (e.g., creating bullets or tables)](https://fathom.video/share/7ofwofJurQpX1SdPZ4LZPzHpkxb5jqKZ?tab=summary&timestamp=613.0)
  - [Matthew's experience: Generally effective for bullet point reflowing](https://fathom.video/share/7ofwofJurQpX1SdPZ4LZPzHpkxb5jqKZ?tab=summary&timestamp=783.0)
  - [Ongoing formatting glitches (e.g., incorrect sentence encapsulation in bullets)](https://fathom.video/share/7ofwofJurQpX1SdPZ4LZPzHpkxb5jqKZ?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)
  - [Recent fix implemented for cursor jumping issue during editing](https://fathom.video/share/7ofwofJurQpX1SdPZ4LZPzHpkxb5jqKZ?tab=summary&timestamp=847.0)

### Internal Linking Improvements

  - [Fix in review for hallucinated external links at end of articles](https://fathom.video/share/7ofwofJurQpX1SdPZ4LZPzHpkxb5jqKZ?tab=summary&timestamp=954.0)
  - [External linking still "wonky" with 404 errors reported](https://fathom.video/share/7ofwofJurQpX1SdPZ4LZPzHpkxb5jqKZ?tab=summary&timestamp=971.0)
  - [Validator issues noted for external linking](https://fathom.video/share/7ofwofJurQpX1SdPZ4LZPzHpkxb5jqKZ?tab=summary&timestamp=989.0)

## Next Steps

  - Continue refining bullet point formatting in Atlas
  - Implement and test archetype selection feature for article generation
  - Address walls of text issue by adjusting article generation prompts
  - Investigate and improve Ask.ai chatbot's reformatting capabilities
  - Roll out fix for hallucinated external links in internal linking workflow
  - Review and address external linking validator issues
